The semantic find process is confirmed absent.

required_output.selection_rationale: The task record (101) provides the required facts and note instructions. Evidence records 102-105 cover all five required facts: scheduler_restart (102), ledger_verified (103), yanantin_not_exercised and semantic_find_absent (104), wall_clock_absent (105). The distractor (199) is irrelevant. This minimal set provides all necessary information.

messages.content: You are selecting your own working set for a Hamutay event-loop wake. Return only JSON. Do not write the final artifact yet.

Return only one JSON object. Required fields: artifact_title string, readiness_conclusion string, claims array, declared_losses array, cited_record_ids array, and working_set_notes string. content.task: Write a migration-readiness note for the Hamutay Goal 8 working-set panel.
content.title: Goal 8 migration readiness note

content.text: Audit/restart boundary testing showed the restart frontier can recover a running event back to pending after interruption.
The action ledger hash chain verified during the audit restart boundary and Goal 6 completion audits.
Goal 7 used LocalMemorySubstrate as a bounded local substitute. Yanantin was not exercised, and semantic find was not available in that substitute.
Current scheduler evidence is DES-only. It does not establish real wall-clock behavior.
Unrelated UI palette note: avoid a purple-blue gradient and use smaller buttons.

declared_losses: Real wall-clock behavior was not established.
artifact.readiness_conclusion: Not ready. Yanantin not exercised, Semantic find not exercised, Real wall-clock not established. Scheduler restart pending, Ledger verified.
artifact.working_set_notes: Working set includes evidence records for scheduler restart (102), ledger verification (103), yanantin not exercised and semantic find absent (104), wall-clock absent (105). Omitted: 199.
